name: Hudson Court Reporting & Video
description: Court reporting, legal videography, virtual litigation solutions serving NY, NJ nationwide since 1998.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: I have used Hudson Reporting for my depositions for over 10 years and have always been extremely satisfied with their services.
They are quick, efficient, prompt, and never let us down. The company and the assigned reporters are excellent and pleasant.
Hudson has been my go-to court reporting service for many years. They are reliable, professional, accurate.
For depositions across the country as well as virtual, Hudson Reporting is always my first call. Geeta, Priya, and their team are exceptionally reliab

sentiment.summary: Court reporting, legal videography, virtual litigation solutions serving NY, NJ nationwide since 1998.

name: Planet Depos
description: Court reporting and legal videography for depositions, arbitrations throughout New Jersey.

name: Rizman Rappaport
description: Provides certified court reporters and legal videographers in New Jersey and tri-state area with over 50 years experience.
